overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime drive through Night City's neon-lit urban center. The player navigates through commercial districts, covered parking structures, and underpasses while surrounded by cyberpunk architecture, holographic advertisements, and wet reflective streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon commercial corridor with holographic advertising

events.description: approaching intersection with red traffic light, slowing down
executing right turn at intersection onto broader street

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense neon-lit commercial district, following a white sedan ahead

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead and turning right at the intersection

entered.detail: towering holographic advertisements with pink and cyan neon colors
white vehicle being followed through the commercial district
cluster of illuminated corporate logos and advertisements atop buildings
tall modern buildings with reflective glass facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet neon-lit commercial street at night, surrounded by towering holographic billboards and glass skyscrapers. The driver follows a white sedan through heavy cyberpunk advertising, then signals and turns right at an intersection, leaving the dense signage behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: broad arterial road approaching Kabuki district

events.description: game notification appears: ENTERING A NEW AREA KABUKI

agents.ego_description: accelerating along multi-lane road toward an overpass structure

entered.detail: elevated highway crossing above the street ahead
large advertisement featuring stylized character with purple hair
yellow and black striped concrete dividers

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates onto a broader arterial road with less dense signage, passing under an overpass. The environment shifts as a game notification marks entry into the Kabuki district, with the El Guapo billboard becoming visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed commercial street with street-level retail

events.description: passing through signalized intersection with crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: cruising through Kabuki district streets, observing pedestrians and storefronts

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along sidewalk near the Mega Market

entered.detail: circular green neon sign for Mega Market store
ground floor commercial storefronts with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Driving through the Kabuki district reveals street-level shops and scattered pedestrians. The El Guapo billboard recedes into the distance as the vehicle approaches an intersection marked by a green Mega Market sign, transitioning toward a covered structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking garage with concrete architecture

events.description: entering covered parking garage from open street, lighting shifts to artificial
approaching garage exit with increasing natural light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through dimly lit concrete parking structure, slowing for tight spaces and ramps

entered.detail: massive structural columns supporting the garage ceiling
enclosed concrete parking facility with low ceilings and artificial lighting
illuminated automated vendor against the wall
stationary vehicles parked along the garage walls

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions abruptly into a dark, enclosed parking garage with concrete pillars and artificial lighting. The driver navigates through the structure, passing parked cars and a vending machine, then approaches a ramp leading back to the surface with light visible at the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial-industrial mixed area with restaurants and underpasses

events.description: exiting parking garage back onto neon-lit street with restaurant signage
turning left under highway overpass into narrower street

agents.ego_description: exiting garage and navigating through mixed commercial-industrial area with neon restaurant signs

entered.detail: orange neon sign for Caliente restaurant
yellow illuminated sign for pizza restaurant
elevated concrete highway structure casting shadows below
orange construction barriers and concrete dividers

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the garage, the vehicle returns to the neon-lit urban environment, passing the Caliente restaurant and pizza shop signs. The drive continues under highway overpasses through a mixed industrial-commercial zone with construction barriers and elevated roadways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a dense, neon-saturated commercial center into the more industrial streetscapes of the Kabuki district. It begins on a wet street surrounded by towering holographic billboards and glass skyscrapers, following a white sedan before signaling a right turn at a busy intersection. As the vehicle accelerates away from the dense signage, the environment opens up onto a broader arterial road that passes under a concrete overpass. The scene then shifts into the Kabuki district, where the towering advertisements give way to street-level shops and scattered pedestrians as a prominent El Guapo billboard recedes into the distance. Finally, the camera approaches a green Mega Market sign at an intersection before turning toward a covered structure ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a concrete parking structure back into the vibrant, neon-lit expanse of the city. It begins within a dark, enclosed garage, navigating past concrete pillars, parked cars, and a vending machine under artificial lighting. As the vehicle approaches a ramp, the dim interior gives way to a bright exit that leads the camera back to the surface. The scene then opens into a vivid urban environment, passing the glowing signs of a pizza shop and Caliente restaurant. Finally, the drive continues under massive highway overpasses through an industrial-commercial zone marked by elevated roadways and construction barriers.
